headline: You won't have long to get these iPad deals before Apple's price hike
summary: Apple recently raised prices for iPads and MacBooks. Many retailers still offer older inventory at lower prices. Act fast to secure significant iPad deals before they disappear.

headline: Polestar has been muscled out of the US market
summary: Polestar is banned from selling 2027+ models in the US. The decision follows a new rule against vehicles with Chinese software. The company is retreating from the US market.

headline: Here's a bunch of Prime Day deals on keyboards, mice, and other peripherals we like
summary: Prime Day features deals on essential computer peripherals. Find discounts on keyboards, mice, and monitors. Despite general tech price hikes, good peripheral savings are available.

headline: This year's Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I've seen
summary: Prime Day features unprecedented discounts on Apple products. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 hit new low prices. Don't miss out on these limited-time Apple deals.

headline: Save $100 Off the BowFlex SelectTech Adjustable Dumbbells for Amazon Prime Day
summary: Get $100 off BowFlex SelectTech Adjustable Dumbbells. These dumbbells are considered the industry gold standard. Limited-time Prime Day offer for fitness enthusiasts.

headline: Save 30% Off the Retired LEGO Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP Hyper-Naked Motorcycle for Prime Day
summary: Score 30% off the retired LEGO Technic Yamaha MT-10 SP. Rare discount on a discontinued Technic motorcycle set. Grab this collectible set during Prime Day.

headline: The Best Prime Day LEGO Deals on Sets for Adults Are Selling Out Fast
summary: Prime Day offers top LEGO deals for adult collectors. Popular adult LEGO sets are selling out quickly. Act fast to secure desired sets before they're gone.

headline: MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ Review
summary: A new review for the MSI Claw 8 EX AI+ has been released. Learn about the portable gaming device's performance. Discover the pros and cons of this new model.

headline: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
summary: Europe's heatwave is moving eastward, with Germany anticipating temperatures up to 40C. France has issued its highest health alert. Heat-related deaths among young people are being reported.

headline: TikTok influencer charged with murdering boyfriend in Dubai
summary: UK TikTok influencer Brooke George charged with murder in Dubai. The 23-year-old from Kent claims self-defense in the stabbing incident. The case involves her boyfriend's death.

headline: Burnham could be leader in weeks under Labour timetable
summary: Andy Burnham could become Labour leader by July 17. This is possible if he remains the sole candidate. The Labour timetable outlines a rapid leadership succession.

headline: Ryanair says it will reluctantly not charge parents to sit next to children
summary: Ryanair will stop charging parents to sit with young children. The airline previously charged £8 per way for this seat selection. This change comes 'reluctantly' from the budget carrier.
